rfi.title: North wall insulation thickness — confirm 1/2" or 1"
rfi.description: Drawings show 1/2" rigid insulation on the north exterior wall but spec section 07 21 13 references 1". Confirm thickness across 4,200 sf.

architectAnswer: Per attached sketch, install 1" rigid insulation on the north exterior wall instead of the 1/2" shown — confirmed.
